texto: Blood diamonds, she thought. That’s exactly what these are. She felt almost as superstitious as the Africans now, as if the pink diamonds themselves had somehow caused all this hardship and death.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Mike Wells: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Blood diamonds, she thought. That’s exactly what these are. frase_original: Blood diamonds, she thought. That’s exactly what these are. She felt almost as superstitious as the Africans now, as if the pink diamonds themselves had somehow caused all this hardship and death.

texto: She was thankful that in her job, she didn’t have to choose sides—she fought against currency counterfeiters, stock and bond forgers, money launderers, diamond smugglers—in short, lowlifes like Spyro Leandrou who engaged in activities that were universally perceived as wrong.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Mike Wells: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “She was thankful that in her job, she didn’t have to choose sides—she fought against currency cou…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que gratidao, crime, secret-service pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de secret-service.
